purpose: Standardized staffing budget framework for grant applications with AI-assisted workflow documentation

staffingModel.philosophy: Human managers direct AI agent assistants to multiply productivity. Grant funding covers staff salaries; AI tools are operational infrastructure that amplify staff output.
staffingModel.costEfficiency: Each funded position leverages AI assistance to produce 3-5x the output of traditional staffing models, providing exceptional ROI for funders.

salaryStructure.rationale: Ensures competitive initial compensation while building in performance-based growth

fringeBenefits.description: Includes health insurance, retirement, payroll taxes, workers comp

aiInfrastructure.description: AI agents are built into the platform - no additional licensing cost
aiInfrastructure.note: Platform development funded separately; operational costs included in overhead

overhead.description: Administrative overhead including facilities, equipment, insurance

grantBudgetNarratives.personnelJustification: Personnel costs represent the core investment in program delivery. Each position is designed with AI agent assistance that multiplies productivity 3-5x compared to traditional staffing. The 90% initial salary structure with 10% Year 2 merit increase ensures competitive compensation while building in performance incentives. Family members in management positions receive 85% rate, reflecting their deeper commitment to organizational mission.
grantBudgetNarratives.aiProductivityMultiplier: Our AI-assisted workflow model enables each staff member to produce significantly more output than traditional positions. For example, the Grant Writer position assisted by Media Agent and Analytics Agent can research, draft, and refine 3-4x more proposals than a traditional grant writer. This productivity multiplier provides exceptional ROI for grant funders - each dollar invested in staffing generates multiple dollars of program output.
grantBudgetNarratives.costEffectiveness: The L.A.W.S. Collective staffing model demonstrates exceptional cost-effectiveness through AI augmentation. Rather than hiring additional staff, we invest in training existing staff to leverage AI tools effectively. This approach reduces total personnel costs while increasing output quality and quantity.
grantBudgetNarratives.sustainabilityPlan: Grant-funded positions are designed to become self-sustaining through program revenue. As staff build programs using AI assistance, those programs generate revenue (training fees, consulting, platform subscriptions) that eventually covers position costs. Our target is 60% earned revenue within 3 years of position funding.

hiringProcess.overview: All positions follow a formal, documented interview and hiring process tailored to position requirements.

stages.name: Application Review
stages.description: HR Agent assists with initial screening against position requirements
stages.aiAssistance: HR Agent reviews applications, flags qualified candidates, identifies red flags

stages.name: Initial Interview
stages.description: Remote interview via Teams with hiring manager
stages.aiAssistance: Support Agent prepares interview questions, HR Agent documents responses

stages.name: Panel Interview
stages.description: Interview with cross-functional panel including relevant department heads
stages.aiAssistance: Operations Agent coordinates scheduling, HR Agent compiles panel feedback

stages.name: Skills Assessment
stages.description: Position-specific assessment demonstrating AI-assisted workflow capability
stages.aiAssistance: Relevant AI agent participates in assessment to evaluate candidate collaboration

stages.name: Reference Check & Offer
stages.description: Background verification and formal offer at 90% salary rate
stages.aiAssistance: HR Agent documents references, Finance Agent prepares offer letter
